headline: The AI Selloff Is Getting Brutal: 10 Tech Giants Already Deep in Bear Market Territory
summary: The AI boom promised to create a new generation of market winners. Instead, it has also exposed just how quickly expectations can outrun reality. After years of paying premium valuations for anything tied to artificial intelligence, investors are now demanding stronger earnings, disciplined spending, and proof that massive AI investments will generate real returns. The ... The AI Selloff Is Getting Brutal: 10 Tech Giants Already Deep in Bear Market Territory

headline: Latest News In Cloud AI - Quantum-Classical Chemistry Collaboration Leverages AWS in Singapore
summary: A recent collaboration between Classiq and Hatch in Singapore has advanced the field of cloud-based quantum-classical computational chemistry by executing a proof-of-concept project through Amazon Web Services (AWS) and Braket. The project, developed as part of Hatch’s Dimension X innovation challenge, demonstrated a hybrid workflow for estimating molecular binding energy, which plays a crucial role in understanding molecular interactions with protein targets. Utilizing Classiq’s quantum...

headline: Oppenheimer Reaffirms Bullish Outlook on ServiceNow (NOW) Amid AI Growth and Cognizant Partnership
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) ranks among the best set-it-and-forget-it stocks to buy right now. Following a discussion with ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) management, Oppenheimer reiterated its Outperform rating and $130 price target for ServiceNow on June 10. headline: Apogee Enterprises Posts Strong Q1 Earnings, Joins ACADIA Pharmaceuticals, Crocs And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Friday
summary: Apogee Enterprises Inc (NASDAQ: APOG) rose sharply after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter financial results. Other big gainers in today's session include FuelCell Energy Inc (NASDAQ: FCEL) up 17.6%, BitVentures Limited (NASDAQ: BVC) up 14.1%, and ACADIA Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ: ACAD) up 10.3% after receiving a positive recommendation for a market authorization in Europe.

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Question

headline: Now Corporation (PSE:NOW) Approves Board Changes, New Risk Chief, And Office Move
summary: Now Corporation (PSE:NOW) approved board-level leadership changes at a recent meeting. Directors confirmed new committee appointments and elected a new Chief Risk Officer. The board also approved the relocation of the company’s principal office. PSE:NOW is trading at ₱0.59, with the stock up 49.4% over the past year, down 15.7% year to date, and down 6.3% over the past 30 days. These mixed returns provide context for shareholders assessing how Now Corporation is organizing itself at the...
